HomePage.title: E-agriculture platform for Senegal
HomePage.subtitle: Manage your parcels, follow crop recommendations and receive real-time weather alerts. A complete solution for smart agriculture.

parcels.title: Parcel management
parcels.desc: Create and track your parcels with geolocation and interactive map.

recommendations.title: Recommendations
recommendations.desc: Crop recommendations based on soil, weather and regions.

weather.title: Weather & data
weather.desc: Weather forecasts and history to optimize your decisions.

alerts.title: Real-time alerts
alerts.desc: Notifications on risks (drought, rain, etc.) per parcel.

Auth.accountsNote: Accounts are created by the administrator.
Auth.sessionTimeout: Your session was closed after a period of inactivity. Please log in again.
